name: vibe-review
description: Continuous graph-native continuous code auditor that executes static analysis (SAST), composition scanning (SCA), and code smell/bug audits in isolated sandboxes.

spiffe-auth.description: Secured via cryptographically verifiable SPIFFE IDs. Enforces Zero Ambient Authority through Just-In-Time (JIT) token downscoping scoped to exact database/repository scopes with instant expiration.

skills.name: Continuous Code Auditing
skills.description: Runs Checkmarx-style SAST checks (44 rules including OWASP Top 10 Injection, Path Traversal, and Insecure Crypto), SCA composition checks (29 package manifests/CVE lookup), and SonarQube-style Code Smell audits (25 maintainability/reliability bugs) in ephemeral gVisor sandboxes.
examples: Clone the repository https://github.com/octocat/Spoon-Knife.git and scan files for SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Perform a composition scan on this project's requirements.txt and package.json to identify CVEs and license compliance risks.
